narrative:
Carlisle City has 3,992 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.8 percentage points.
